title: Brain Squeezers
description: The game show that‘s all the buzz. Kids and teens answer questions in hopes of winning $10,000. But beware incorrect answers, you might get doinked!
altHero: teams and host on the set of Brain Squeezers
alt1: the host pointing and a graphic says “Doink!”
alt2: teen boy convered in cream-colored goop
alt4: another teen girl trying to grab a stack of cash, but a big wrestler guy is laying on top of her
tags: game shows with a bit of danger!
